assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: Local service businesses in Suriname that want a simpler, more consistent way to invite genuine customer reviews

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Satisfied customers may be willing to leave a genuine review but often need a clear, convenient invitation.
creative_strategy.message_angle: A review link, QR prompt, and follow-up message reduce friction without manufacturing feedback.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: Showing a simple handoff from service moment to review invitation will communicate the workflow while protecting authenticity.

format.crop_guidance: Center the human service handoff and QR card; preserve an uncluttered upper-left area for final typography.

visual_direction.subject: A friendly local business owner handing a small elegant review card to a satisfied customer
visual_direction.action: The customer scans a clean abstract QR code area while the owner completes a natural service interaction
visual_direction.environment: Bright contemporary Suriname service-business interior with no identifiable private brand
visual_direction.composition: Close editorial crop on hands, card, and warm human interaction; QR card at the central focal point; open upper-left copy space
visual_direction.lighting: Soft natural window light with subtle lime edge accents and warm realistic skin tones
visual_direction.style: Authentic premium lifestyle photography, candid rather than posed, tactile details, modern and trustworthy

copy.overlay_support: Review link • QR prompt • Follow-up copy
copy.caption: A satisfied customer should not have to search for where to leave feedback. Zenta creates a clear review link, QR prompt, and WhatsApp follow-up copy so businesses can invite genuine reviews consistently.

image_prompt: Create a polished 1:1 base image concept for a Zenta Creative organic image post. The central subject is A friendly local business owner handing a small elegant review card to a satisfied customer. Show The customer scans a clean abstract QR code area while the owner completes a natural service interaction. Set the scene in Bright contemporary Suriname service-business interior with no identifiable private brand. Composition: Close editorial crop on hands, card, and warm human interaction; QR card at the central focal point; open upper-left copy space. Lighting: Soft natural window light with subtle lime edge accents and warm realistic skin tones. Visual style: Authentic premium lifestyle photography, candid rather than posed, tactile details, modern and trustworthy. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #FFB86B; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'A review link, QR prompt, and follow-up message reduce friction without manufacturing feedback.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Make trust easy to share.', support line 'Review link • QR prompt • Follow-up copy', and CTA 'Build your review flow' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid no distorted fingers, phones, cards, or faces, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
no distorted fingers, phones, cards, or faces

accessibility.alt_text: A local business owner hands a review invitation card to a customer, who scans its QR prompt after a service interaction.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Do not fabricate reviews, ratings, testimonials, customer identities, or incentives.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
